finalized_plan.description: Perform a refined web search using keywords “James's channel season 4 test Cheater Cheater Beater CFM” to narrow down the candidate source, ensuring that the source is directly related to James’s channel and features the technical test details

Identify and select the candidate result (likely from the “CHEATER BEATERS!” playlist, if it includes technical details) by verifying the video title, description, or metadata that hint at CFM test information
Visit the selected candidate page using the visit_page tool to access either the transcript or the relevant on-screen content
Use the find_on_page_ctrl_f tool to search for keywords such as “CFM”, “Cheater”, and “Cheater Beater” within the page content to locate the section containing the test details
Extract the numerical values corresponding to the “Cheater” and “Cheater Beater” from the located content
Verify that the extracted CFM number for the Cheater is indeed higher than the one for the Cheater Beater
Consolidate the extracted information into the final report format: “CFM number for Cheater, CFM number for Cheater beater.”
Prepare and output a final answer containing a short task outcome summary, an extremely detailed explanation of the process, and any additional context regarding the testing methodology or source

root_cause_reasoning: The agent was unable to locate the target webpage throughout its attempts.
notes: Controversial!  The finalized plan is problematic — it's overly detailed.
